# 📡 IR Codes Library (Global Caché Format)

This document contains the complete, hardware-verified hexadecimal/pulse strings used by the BeoLiving Intelligence to control the Topping stack and vintage B&O equipment via the Global Caché iTach network adapter. 

**Important Hardware Note (v3.8.0):** * The Topping D90 DAC (RC-15A) and Topping A90 Discrete (RC-16A) use completely different IR address headers (`0x11EE` vs `0x5AA5`), allowing them to be safely blasted without cross-contamination. 
* All Topping codes below are raw, single-pulse NEC captures processed through Global Caché iLearn with corrected repeat values to prevent command looping.
* The Topping A90 Discrete requires a 300ms "Wake" pulse (Center Button) prior to receiving operational commands to bypass its OLED screen-saver sleep state.

---

## 🎧 Topping D90 DAC
**Remote:** RC-15A | **Format:** NEC (37.7 kHz) | **iTach Port:** `1:1`

*Note: The D90 driver logic relies on the hardware's native "Auto-Sense" feature for primary input switching. The Left/Right arrow strings are provided for manual fallback UI buttons.*

**Arrow Right (Input >>)**
`sendir,1:1,1,37764,1,1,341,170,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,1517,341,85,22,3645,341,85,22,3645,341,85,22,3700`

**Arrow Left (Input <<)**
`sendir,1:1,1,37764,1,1,341,170,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,1515,341,85,22,3644,341,85,22,3700`

**FIR Filter Toggle**
`sendir,1:1,1,37764,1,1,341,170,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,21,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,21,22,63,22,1515,341,85,22,3643,341,85,22,3700`

## 🎛️ Topping A90 Discrete Pre-Amp
**Remote:** RC-16A | **Format:** NEC (38.2 kHz) | **iTach Port:** `1:2`

*Note: The XLR and RCA input selections must be physically saved to the RC-16A `C1` and `C2` hardware memory buttons respectively for discrete automation routing.*

**Center Button (Wake Sequence)**
`sendir,1:2,1,38226,1,1,343,171,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,21,22,64,22,1525,343,85,22,3800`

## 📻 Beomaster 8000 / Datalink
**Remote:** Beolab Terminal | **Format:** Custom B&O (40.9 kHz) | **iTach Port:** `1:3`

**Phono ON**
`sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,1024,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,1024,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,4000`

**FM Radio ON**
`sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,640,256,1024,128,640,256,1024,128,640,256,4000`

**Scan UP (Next Track / Station >>)**
`sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,256,384,128,1024,128,128,256,384,128,1024,128,128,256,384,128,4000`

**Scan DOWN (Prev Track / Station <<)**
